hero.subtitle: Abuur, maamul, oo kobci ururkaaga waxbarasho hal goob oo awood leh oo daruur ku salaysan oo loogu talagalay waxbarashada casriga ah.
hero.dashboard_auto_generated: Si toos ah ayaa loo soo saaray

trust.title: Laguaamminoonay beesha barashada adduunka oo dhan

audience.title: Loo Sameeyay Bulsho Kasta oo Barasho ah
audience.subtitle: Had iyo goor macalin gaar ah ama hay'ad caalami ah, goobtayada waa kuwaa kugu habboon.

cards.title: Dugsiyada K-12
cards.description: Maamul fasallada, la soco xaadiritaanka, oo bixi manhajka heer kasta.

cards.title: Jaamacadaha
cards.description: LMS awood leh oo loogu talagalay tacliinta sare oo leh falanqeyn sare.

cards.title: Akademiyada Tababarka
cards.description: Barnaamijyada shahaadada xirfadeed, tababarka xirfadaha, iyo maaraynta.

cards.title: Barashada Shirkadaha
cards.description: Tababarka shaqaalaha, u hoggaansanaanta, iyo horumarka xirfadeed.

cards.title: Macallimiin Madax Banaan
cards.description: Ka faa'iidee aqoontaada adoo isticmaalaya goob waxbarasho summad leh.

cards.title: Beesha Khaanadka
cards.description: Abuur waayo-aragnimo waxbarasho oo soo jiidasho leh oo loogu talagalay beeshaada.

cards.title: Shabakadaha Dugsi-guriga
cards.description: Bixinta manhaj habaysan, la socodka horumarka, iyo qalabka wada shaqaynta.

cards.title: Hay'adaha Samafalka
cards.description: Bixi barnaamijyada waxbarasho ee bulshooyinka aan la gaadhin oo leh qalab awood leh.

features.title: Wax Kasta oo Aad u Baahan Tahay Si Aad u Guuleysato
features.subtitle: Qalab dhameystiran oo loogu talagalay in lagu bixiyo waayo-aragnimo waxbarasho oo heer sare ah.

list.title: Abuuraha Koorsooyinka
list.description: Abuur koorsooyin si fudud oo leh multimedia, su'aalo, iyo shaqooyin.

list.title: Duruusta Fiidyowga
list.description: Soo geli ama ku dar fiidyooyinka YouTube, Vimeo, iyo MP4.

list.title: Duruusta PDF & HTML
list.description: Duruus qoraal ah oo hodan ah oo leh PDF, sawirro, iyo nuxur qaabaysan.

list.title: Shaqooyinka
list.description: Abuur, qaybi, oo buundiyee shaqooyinka leh raacida faylasha.

list.title: Su'aalaha & Imtixaanada
list.description: Doorasho badan, run/been, iyo su'aalo qoraal ah oo leh buundeyn toos ah.

list.title: Shahaadooyinka
list.description: Shahaadooyin dhammayn ah oo si toos ah loo soo saaro oo leh naqshado gaar ah.

list.title: La Socodka Horumarka
list.description: Dashboard-yada horumarka ardayda ee waqtiga dhabta ah.

list.title: Falanqaynta & Warbixinta
list.description: Falanqeyn dhameystiran oo ku saabsan ka qaybgalka, waxqabadka, iyo isbeddellada.

list.title: Xaadiritaanka
list.description: La soco xaadiritaanka QR code-yada, hubinta gacanta, ama is-warbixinta.

list.title: Farriimaha
list.description: Ogeysiisyo iyo farriimo toos ah oo u dhexeeya dhammaan doorarka isticmaalayaasha.

list.title: Ogeysiisyada
list.description: Ogeysiisyada email, app-ka, iyo fariimaha si qof walba loo ogeysiiyo.

list.title: Maamulka Doorarka
list.description: Rukhsadaha faahfaahsan ee adminka, macallimiinta, ardayda, iyo waalidiinta.

list.title: La Jaan Qaadi Kara Moobiilka
list.description: Naqshadeyn si buuxda u jawaabaysa oo ka shaqaysa qalab kasta.

list.title: Habka Madow
list.description: Mowduuc madow oo indhaha u roon oo si toos ah ama gacanta loogu beddelo.

list.title: Mareegta API
list.description: API RESTful oo loogu talagalay isku xidhka habaysan ee nidaamyadaaga.

list.title: Luuqado Badan
list.description: Caalamiyaynta dhamaystiran oo taageeraysa Ingiriisiga, Carabiga, Soomaaliga, iyo kuwa kale.

multitenant.subtitle: Ururo kasta wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa jawi gaar ah oo ammaan ah oo leh qarsoodi iyo madaxbannaanidhameystiran. Isticmaalayaasha waxay heli karaan oo keliya macluumaadka ururadooda.
multitenant.platform_desc: Xakamaynta midaysan ee dhammaan goobaha shaqada
multitenant.security_caption: Go'doominta xogta oo dhamaystiran - goob kasta oo shaqo waa madaxbannaan oo ammaan ah

benefits.title: Go'doominta Xogta oo Dhamaystiran
benefits.description: Goob kasta oo shaqo waxay leedahay kayd gaar ah. Ururo kastana ma heli karaan xogta ururka kale.

benefits.title: Maamul Madaxbannaan
benefits.description: Ururo kasta wuxuu si madaxbannaan u maamulaa isticmaalayaasha, koorsooyinka, iyo goobaha.

benefits.title: Xakamaynta Helitaanka Ammaan ah
benefits.description: Rukhsadaha doorarka waxay hubinayaan in isticmaalayaashu ay arkaan oo keliya waxa loo oggol yahay.

benefits.title: Qaabdhismeedka Daruurta oo La Kordhin Karo
benefits.description: Infrastructure-ka daruurta oo si toos ah u kordha marka ururkaagu kobco.

benefits.title: Maamul Dhexe oo Goobta
benefits.description: Adminka super-ka ah ayaa ilaalinaya kormeerka dhammaan goobaha shaqada hal dashboard oo midaysan.

how.title: Sida Ay u Shaqayso
how.subtitle: Ku billow goobtaada waxbarasho daqiiqado gudahood.

steps.title: Abuur Goob Shaqo
steps.description: Isqor ilbiriqsiyo gudahood oo hel goob shaqo oo summad leh oo diyaar ah.

steps.title: Ku Casuum Kooxdaada
steps.description: Ku dar macallimiin, arday, iyo maamulayaal leh rukhsadaha doorarka.

steps.title: Dhis Nuxurka Waxbarasho
steps.description: Abuur koorsooyin leh fiidyoow, duruus, su'aalo, shaqooyin, iyo shahaadooyin.

steps.title: Bilaab Waxbaridda
steps.description: Bilaab barnaamijyadaada oo la soco horumarka falanqaynta waqtiga-dhabta ah.

pricing.title: Qiimo Fudud oo Cad
pricing.subtitle: Bilaab bilaash oo kor soco hadba sidaad u korto. Wax qarsoodi ah malahan.

enterprise.name: Shirkadeed
enterprise.description: Xalalka gaarka ah ee ururada waaweyn.

faq.title: Su'aalaha Inta La Isweydiiyo
faq.subtitle: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay inaad ka ogaato goobta.

questions.a: Waa goob maaraynta waxbarashada kirada badan oo siinaysa urur kasta goob shaqo gaar ah oo leh go'doomin xog oo dhammaystiran.

questions.q: Sidee ayay u shaqaysaa kirada badani?
questions.a: Ururo kasta waxay helaan goob go'doonsan — isticmaalayaal, koorsooyin, fasallo, summad, iyo goobo u gaar ah.
Haa! Dhammaan qorshayaasha waxaa ku jira 14 maalmood oo tijaabo bilaash ah oo leh marin buuxda.
Qorshayaasha Xirfadeed iyo Shirkadeed waxaa ku jira ikhtiyaaro summaynta gaarka ah.
Waxaan aqbalnaa dhammaan kaararka waaweyn iyo xawilaadaha bangiyada.
Haa. Waxaan isticmaalnaa sirta AES-256 iyo hubin ammaan oo joogto ah.

questions.q: Ma ka soo guuri karaa goob kale?
questions.a: Haa, qorshayaasha Enterprise waxaan bixinaa gargaar guuritaanka.
Dhammaan qorshayaasha waxaa ku jira taageero email. Xirfadeedku wuxuu helaa taageero mudnaan leh.

cta.title: Diyaar Ma U Tahay Inaad Beddesho Waxbarashada?
cta.subtitle: Ku soo biir kumanaan ururo ah oo ku kalsoon goobtayada. Bilaab maanta.
cta.footer_note: Tijaabo bilaash ah 14 maalmood · Lacag laguma qasbo · Ka noqo wakhti kasta

footer.brand_desc: Goobta dhamaystiran ee maaraynta waxbarashada. Abuur, maamul, oo kobci ururkaaga waxbarasho hal xal daruur ah.
